2024 - MusicAgainst Interpretation

Music: Against Interpretation

Music published as “Against Interpretation” on Bandcamp, Spotify, Apple Music and other platforms. Debut record is released in April 2025 on the Abstrakce label (Valencia, Spain). With gratitude to Joel Negus of Cleveland Scoring for the mentorship and mastering.
